description: Turn an IDF domain into an MCP server with invariants and role scopes in every tool description.
name: io.github.intent-driven-software/idf-mcp

environmentVariables.description: Base URL of the IDF host runtime (e.g. http://localhost:3001).
environmentVariables.name: IDF_SERVER

environmentVariables.description: IDF domain to expose as MCP tools (e.g. invest, booking, planning).
environmentVariables.name: IDF_DOMAIN

environmentVariables.description: Set to 0 if the host runtime already bootstrapped the domain; 1 (default) to bootstrap from IDF_ONTOLOGY_PATH on first connection.
environmentVariables.name: IDF_BOOTSTRAP

environmentVariables.description: Filesystem path to the domain ontology module (only used when IDF_BOOTSTRAP=1).
environmentVariables.name: IDF_ONTOLOGY_PATH

environmentVariables.description: Optional bearer token forwarded to the host runtime as the agent's role credential.
environmentVariables.name: IDF_AUTH_TOKEN
